scripts.profile:wasm-gc:v8: node runners/v8/run-wasm-gc.mjs bench/_build/wasm-gc/release/build/cmd/main/main.wasm wasm-gc.cpuprofile 5 && .bin/moon-pprof cpuprofile2pprof wasm-gc.cpuprofile wasm-gc.pb.gz
scripts.profile:js: node runners/v8/run-js.mjs $PWD/bench/_build/js/release/build/cmd/main/main.js js.cpuprofile && .bin/moon-pprof cpuprofile2pprof js.cpuprofile js.pb.gz
scripts.profile:native: samply record --save-only --unstable-presymbolicate -o native-samply.json.gz --no-open -- bench/_build/native/release/build/cmd/main/main.exe && .bin/moon-pprof firefox2pprof --source samply --syms native-samply.json.syms.json native-samply.json.gz native.pb.gz
